homepage.heroSubline: Restore your curb appeal. Protect your investment. S&S Washing LLC delivers exceptional results across Portland.
aboutText: S&S Washing LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Portland homeowners and businesses with reliable, high-quality pressure washing services. We saw firsthand the toll that Portland's unique climate – the constant rain, the moss, the mildew – took on local properties.

Our approach is straightforward: We use the right equipment, the right techniques, and the right people for every job. We're not just blasting away dirt; we're protecting your investment and enhancing your property's appearance. We value clear communication, meticulous work, and exceeding expectations.

We're proud to be a part of the Portland community. We support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact by using eco-friendly cleaning solutions whenever possible. We believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Years of experience tackling Portland's toughest grime and stains.

valueProps.title: Advanced Equipment
valueProps.description: We utilize professional-grade pressure washers and surface cleaners for superior results.

valueProps.title: Eco-Friendly Solutions
valueProps.description: Safe and effective cleaning agents that are gentle on the environment.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work and ensure you're completely satisfied with the results.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote today and see the S&S Washing difference.

services.name: House Washing
services.shortDescription: Revitalize your home's exterior and protect it from the elements.
services.description:
Portland's wet climate breeds moss, mildew, and algae, which can damage siding, brick, and other exterior surfaces. Our house washing service removes these contaminants, preventing long-term damage and restoring your home's curb appeal. We use a soft washing technique that combines low pressure with specialized cleaning solutions to safely and effectively clean all types of siding, including vinyl, wood, stucco, and brick. 

Our process starts with a thorough assessment of your home's exterior to identify areas of concern and determine the appropriate cleaning solutions. We then apply our cleaning solution, allow it to dwell for a specified period, and rinse it away with low-pressure water. This method ensures a deep clean without damaging your siding or landscaping. 

We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that all surfaces are thoroughly cleaned and rinsed. We also take precautions to protect your plants and outdoor furniture. With S&S Washing, you can be confident that your home will look its best, and its value will be protected.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of the property.
Step 2: Application of eco-friendly cleaning solution.
Step 3: Gentle soft washing to remove dirt and grime.
Step 4: Final rinse and inspection.
benefits: Removes unsightly mold, mildew, and algae.
Protects your siding from long-term damage.
Increases your home's curb appeal and value.
Creates a healthier living environment.

faq.question: What is soft washing?
faq.answer: Soft washing uses low pressure to apply cleaning solutions, preventing damage to delicate surfaces. It's ideal for siding, roofs, and fences.

faq.question: How often should I wash my house?
faq.answer: We recommend washing your house every 1-2 years to prevent the buildup of dirt, grime, and organic growth.

faq.question: Are your cleaning solutions safe for plants and pets?
faq.answer: Yes, we use eco-friendly cleaning solutions that are safe for plants, pets, and the environment.

services.name: Roof Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Protect your roof and prevent costly repairs with our professional cleaning services.
services.description:
A dirty roof isn't just an eyesore; it can also lead to serious damage and costly repairs. Moss, algae, and lichen trap moisture, which can weaken roofing materials and cause leaks. Our roof cleaning service removes these contaminants, extending the life of your roof and protecting your home. We use a specialized soft washing technique that is safe for all types of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, and metal. 

Our team understands the unique challenges of roof cleaning in Portland. We take extra care to protect your landscaping and prevent damage to your property. We also use environmentally friendly cleaning solutions that won't harm your plants or pets. 

Don't wait until it's too late. Protect your investment with our professional roof cleaning service. We'll remove the dirt, grime, and organic growth that's damaging your roof and restore its beauty. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Roof inspection and assessment.
Step 2: Application of algaecide to kill organic growth.
Step 3: Gentle soft washing to remove debris.
Step 4: Final inspection and debris removal.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof.
Prevents costly repairs.
Improves your home's curb appeal.
Removes harmful moss and algae.

faq.question: Will roof cleaning damage my shingles?
faq.answer: No, our soft washing technique is safe for all types of roofing materials. We use low pressure to avoid damaging your shingles.

faq.question: How long does roof cleaning last?
faq.answer: The results of roof cleaning can last for several years, depending on the environment and the type of roofing material.

faq.question: Is roof cleaning worth the investment?
faq.answer: Yes, roof cleaning is a worthwhile investment that can save you money on costly repairs and extend the life of your roof.

services.name: Driveway & Patio Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Remove stains and restore the beauty of your concrete and paver surfaces.
services.description:
Driveways and patios are prone to stains from oil, grease, dirt, and algae. These stains not only look unsightly but can also make surfaces slippery and dangerous. Our driveway and patio cleaning service removes these stains, restoring the beauty of your outdoor living spaces and making them safer for your family and guests. We use high-pressure washing equipment and specialized cleaning solutions to effectively clean concrete, pavers, brick, and other surfaces. 

We understand that every driveway and patio is different. That's why we tailor our cleaning approach to meet the specific needs of your property. We'll assess the type of stains, the surface material, and the surrounding landscaping to determine the best cleaning method. 

With S&S Washing, you can be confident that your driveway and patio will look their best. We'll remove the dirt, grime, and stains that are detracting from your property's appearance and restore its beauty.
process: Step 1: Pre-treatment with degreaser and cleaner.
Step 2: High-pressure washing with surface cleaner.
Step 3: Post-treatment to prevent future stains.
Step 4: Thorough rinsing and debris removal.
benefits: Removes unsightly stains from oil, grease, and dirt.
Restores the beauty of your outdoor living spaces.
Makes surfaces safer and less slippery.
Prevents the growth of algae and mildew.

faq.question: Can you remove oil stains from my driveway?
faq.answer: Yes, we use specialized degreasers and high-pressure washing equipment to effectively remove oil stains from concrete and asphalt driveways.

faq.question: How long does it take to clean a driveway?
faq.answer: The time it takes to clean a driveway depends on its size and the severity of the stains. Most driveways can be cleaned in a few hours.

faq.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
faq.answer: No, you don't need to be home during the cleaning. We can work independently and will notify you when the job is complete.

services.name: Fence Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your fence and enhance its appearance with our professional cleaning services.
services.description:
Fences are exposed to the elements, making them susceptible to dirt, grime, algae, and mildew. These contaminants can not only make your fence look unsightly but can also damage the wood or vinyl over time. Our fence cleaning service removes these contaminants, extending the life of your fence and enhancing its appearance. We use a soft washing technique that is safe for all types of fences, including wood, vinyl, and metal. 

Our team takes pride in providing quality fence cleaning services in Portland. We understand the importance of protecting your property and ensuring that your fence looks its best. We use eco-friendly cleaning solutions that won't harm your plants or pets. We'll also take care to protect your landscaping and prevent damage to your property.

Don't let a dirty fence detract from your property's appearance. Contact us today for a free estimate and let us restore your fence's beauty.
process: Step 1: Inspection and assessment of the fence.
Step 2: Application of eco-friendly cleaning solution.
Step 3: Gentle soft washing to remove dirt and grime.
Step 4: Final rinse and inspection.
benefits: Removes dirt, grime, algae, and mildew.
Extends the life of your fence.
Enhances your property's appearance.
Protects your fence from damage.

faq.question: Will fence cleaning damage my plants?
faq.answer: No, we use eco-friendly cleaning solutions that are safe for plants and pets. We also take precautions to protect your landscaping.

faq.question: How often should I clean my fence?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your fence every 1-2 years to prevent the buildup of dirt, grime, and organic growth.

faq.question: Can you remove graffiti from my fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can remove graffiti from most types of fences. Contact us for a free estimate.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Prevent water damage and protect your home with our thorough gutter cleaning services.
services.description:
Clogged gutters can cause a variety of problems, including water damage to your roof, siding, and foundation. They can also create breeding grounds for mosquitoes and other pests. Our gutter cleaning service removes leaves, debris, and other obstructions, ensuring that your gutters are functioning properly and protecting your home from water damage. We manually remove all debris from your gutters and downspouts, ensuring that they are clear and free-flowing. 

We understand the importance of keeping your gutters clean and well-maintained. That's why we offer a comprehensive gutter cleaning service that includes: Removal of all leaves, debris, and other obstructions; Flushing of downspouts; Inspection of gutters for damage; Bagging and removal of debris. 

Don't wait until it's too late. Protect your home from water damage with our professional gutter cleaning service. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Removal of all leaves and debris from gutters.
Step 2: Flushing of downspouts to ensure proper flow.
Step 3: Inspection of gutters for damage.
Step 4: Bagging and removal of debris.
benefits: Prevents water damage to your roof, siding, and foundation.
Eliminates breeding grounds for mosquitoes and other pests.
Extends the life of your gutters.
Protects your home from water damage.

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, in the spring and fall. If you live in an area with a lot of trees, you may need to clean them more often.

faq.question: Can you repair damaged gutters?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer gutter repair services. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: Do I need to be home during the gutter cleaning?
faq.answer: No, you don't need to be home during the gutter cleaning. We can work independently and will notify you when the job is complete.

services.name: Commercial Pressure Washing
services.shortDescription: Maintain a professional image and protect your business with our commercial pressure washing services.
services.description:
First impressions matter. A clean and well-maintained exterior can attract customers and create a positive image for your business. Our commercial pressure washing service removes dirt, grime, graffiti, and other contaminants from your building's exterior, sidewalks, parking lots, and other surfaces. We use commercial-grade equipment and specialized cleaning solutions to effectively clean all types of surfaces, including concrete, brick, stucco, and metal. 

We understand the unique needs of commercial properties. We offer flexible scheduling to minimize disruption to your business operations. We also take precautions to protect your landscaping and prevent damage to your property. 

With S&S Washing, you can be confident that your business will look its best. We'll remove the dirt, grime, and graffiti that are detracting from your property's appearance and restore its beauty. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and planning.
Step 2: Application of commercial-grade cleaning solutions.
Step 3: High-pressure washing with specialized equipment.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup.
benefits: Maintains a professional image for your business.
Attracts customers and increases sales.
Protects your property from damage.
Creates a safe and healthy environment for employees and customers.

faq.question: Do you offer after-hours cleaning?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer after-hours cleaning to minimize disruption to your business operations.

faq.question: Can you remove graffiti from my building?
faq.answer: Yes, we can remove graffiti from most types of surfaces. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: What types of businesses do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of businesses, including restaurants, retail stores, office buildings, and industrial facilities.

serviceAreas.content:
S&S Washing LLC is proud to offer our professional pressure washing services to Beaverton, Oregon. This vibrant city, home to around 100,000 residents, features many homes built in the 1970s and 80s, a time when suburban ranch-style houses were popular. These homes, while charming, can accumulate moss, algae, and dirt over time due to our region's persistent rain.

Our team understands the specific needs of Beaverton homeowners. We utilize gentle yet effective cleaning methods to restore the beauty of your home's exterior, from siding and roofs to driveways and decks. We are committed to providing top-notch service and outstanding results, ensuring your Beaverton home looks its best.
serviceAreas.localContext: Beaverton's mild, wet winters contribute to significant moss and algae growth on exterior surfaces. S&S Washing LLC provides solutions to combat this common issue.

serviceAreas.content:
S&S Washing LLC proudly serves the growing community of Hillsboro, Oregon. As a hub of the tech corridor, Hillsboro boasts many newer homes and modern developments. While newer materials are often more resistant to grime, regular cleaning is still essential to maintain their pristine appearance and prevent long-term damage.

We offer a comprehensive range of pressure washing services tailored to the specific needs of Hillsboro's diverse housing stock. From removing dirt and debris from siding to cleaning patios and walkways, our experienced technicians use advanced equipment and eco-friendly solutions to deliver exceptional results. We are dedicated to keeping Hillsboro homes looking their best.
serviceAreas.localContext: Hillsboro's rapid growth means many newer homes benefit from regular pressure washing to maintain their curb appeal. We are ready to help.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: S&S Washing did an amazing job on our house in the Hawthorne district. Our siding was covered in moss and algae, and now it looks brand new! They were professional, efficient, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our driveway was a mess with oil stains and dirt. S&S Washing came out and made it look like new again. They were on time and did a great job. I only wish they had sealed it afterward, but overall very satisfied.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: We had S&S Washing clean our roof, which had a lot of moss growing on it. They did a fantastic job and were very careful not to damage anything. They used a soft wash technique and the roof looks pristine. Great service!

reviews.name: John P.
reviews.text: S&S Washing cleaned our gutters and they are now flowing freely. They were very thorough and even took pictures to show us the before and after. Excellent communication and service.

reviews.name: Lisa G.
reviews.text: Our wood fence was looking pretty weathered. S&S Washing cleaned it up and it made a huge difference. The fence looks much newer and brighter. They were quick and efficient.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: S&S Washing does a fantastic job keeping the exterior of our building clean. They are responsive and always do a thorough job. Highly recommended for any business in Portland!
